items.name: Brass Key
items.description: A small brass key with intricate engravings. It looks like it could open a door or a chest.

items.name: Caretaker's Journal
items.description: A weathered journal filled with maintenance notes. One marked page describes removing the telescope's focusing lens during the observatory's final night of operation.

items.name: Telescope Lens
items.description: A heavy glass lens held in a brass frame. Its edge is engraved with the same celestial pattern as the observatory telescope.
